journal_entry.reason: Capitalize site improvements (depreciable PP&E) and permanent landscaping (Land) per IAS 16. Site improvements include fencing, streetlights, and walkways. Permanent landscaping installations become part of the land. Cash and cheque payments reduce cash and cash equivalents.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Ford capitalized construction costs for factory site infrastructure. Under IAS 16, fencing, streetlights, and walkways are depreciable site improvements (PP&E), while permanent landscaping installations that become part of the land are capitalized to the Land account (non-depreciable). The transaction involves two asset acquisitions paid by cash and cheque respectively. Total debits = $1,750,000 + $2,360,000 = $4,110,000. Total credits = $1,750,000 + $2,360,000 = $4,110,000. Entry balances.
